summary: Removed the empty fake function fn_80386230 from src/sysdolphin/baselib/texpdag.c and folded its 4-byte symbol range into make_full_dependancy_mtx by increasing that symbol size from 0x130 to 0x134 in config/GALE01/symbols.txt. Bot output reported total functions decreased by one, fn_80386230 became a broken match, and make_full_dependancy_mtx improved from 97.50% to 98.83%.

key_files.role: Adjusted text symbol metadata by removing fn_80386230 and extending make_full_dependancy_mtx size from 0x130 to 0x134.
Removed empty fake function definition void fn_80386230(void) {} between make_full_dependancy_mtx and pad data.

what_changed.text: Deleted the empty function body `void fn_80386230(void) {}` from texpdag.c.
Removed the `fn_80386230 = .text:0x80386230; // type:function size:0x4` symbol entry.
Changed `make_full_dependancy_mtx` symbol size at .text:0x80386100 from 0x130 to 0x134.
The bot report recorded one fewer total function, a broken match for the removed `fn_80386230`, and an unmatched-item improvement for `make_full_dependancy_mtx`.

smart_moves.text: Handled a suspected fake 4-byte function by correcting the symbol boundary instead of preserving an empty source stub.
evidence_refs: PR title: Remove fake function in texpdag

smart_moves.text: Kept the edit narrowly scoped to one source file and the corresponding symbols metadata.
evidence_refs: changed_files: two files, one hunk each

decomp_lessons.text: If an address-style 4-byte empty function sits immediately after a partially matched function, check whether it is a bad symbol split before keeping the empty function in source.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: removal of fn_80386230 and make_full_dependancy_mtx size increase
text_corpus: bot report showing fn_80386230 removed as a function and make_full_dependancy_mtx improved

decomp_lessons.text: A removed fake function may intentionally show as a broken match in automated reporting while the neighboring real function improves; treat this as a signal to inspect symbol ownership rather than as standalone evidence of a source regression.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] report with one broken match for fn_80386230 and one improvement for make_full_dependancy_mtx

naming_conventions.text: Address-style `fn_80386230` was removed rather than renamed; the PR does not provide semantic naming evidence for that address.
The existing spelling `make_full_dependancy_mtx` was preserved while only its symbol size changed.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Resolved a tiny apparent function by extending the preceding function's symbol size by 4 bytes instead of keeping a fake no-op C function.
Used symbols metadata as the matching lever; no source control-flow rewrite, pragma, inline assembly, or padding tactic is shown by the diff.

review_feedback.text: No human review comments were present in the loaded PR slice.
Automated bot feedback reported: Total functions 19830 (-1), matched code 57.57% (-4 bytes), one broken match for `fn_80386230`, and one improvement for `make_full_dependancy_mtx`.

follow_up_queries: decomp-dev bot broken match removed function

notes: The diff directly proves the file edits and symbol-size change.
The PR title supports the interpretation that fn_80386230 was considered fake.
There is no PR body and no human review discussion explaining author rationale.
The bot report is available, but it reports progress/regression symptoms rather than proving the historical matching intent.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Remove fake empty functions by correcting adjacent symbol boundaries when evidence supports it
accepted_candidate_records.text: A tiny address-style empty function adjacent to a partially matched real function can be a bad symbol split. In this PR, `fn_80386230` was removed and `make_full_dependancy_mtx` was extended by 4 bytes in symbols metadata, with the bot reporting the fake function as removed and the neighboring function as improved.

source_update_candidates.title: texpdag symbol-boundary cleanup for fn_80386230
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2287 removed `fn_80386230` from `src/sysdolphin/baselib/texpdag.c` and `config/GALE01/symbols.txt`, folding its 4-byte range into `make_full_dependancy_mtx` by changing that function's size from 0x130 to 0x134.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a concrete path-specific historical cleanup that may help future searches around fake functions and symbol boundaries.

source_update_candidates.title: Symbol-boundary check before preserving tiny fake functions
source_update_candidates.text: Consider adding or cross-linking guidance that tiny empty `fn_` functions adjacent to a real function should prompt a symbols/split boundary check before being preserved in C source.
evidence_refs: PR title: Remove fake function in texpdag
raw_diff: removal of fn_80386230 and size increase for make_full_dependancy_mtx
source_update_candidates.reason: The existing standards cover metadata and fake storage broadly; this PR supplies a concise example for fake function boundary cleanup, but curator should decide whether it warrants global-standard text.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that `make_full_dependancy_mtx` fully matched after this PR; the bot report only shows improvement from 97.50% to 98.83%.
Do not infer why the final 4 bytes belong to `make_full_dependancy_mtx` beyond the PR title, diff, and bot report; no author explanation or objdiff details are present.
Do not promote `fn_80386230` as a semantic symbol or rename candidate; the PR removed it as fake.
